account.name: Tobias Scholze - The Stuttering Nerd
account.description: From the life of a stuttering nerd with multiple sclerosis

publications.title: 3D-Druck Stützstrukturen haben schon etwas magisches, oder?  #3ddruck #3ddrucker #3dprinting
publications.description: Findet ihr auch, dass die Stützstrukturen von 3D-Druck Modellen oft sehr magische und nicht von dieser Welt wirken? Welche Tipps habt ihr für Strukturen und was sind Eure Lieblinge?

publications.title: 3D-Druck Prototyp meines Roboters aus Prototyp Filament der @recyclingfabrik  #3ddruck #3dprinting
publications.description:
Mein erster 3D-Druck als Unibody hat echt Überwindung gekostet! Das amüsante daran ist, dass dieser Prototyp meines kleinen Raspberry Pi Robotors auch mit Prototypen Filament von der @recyclingfabrik   wurde! 

Das klappte echt gut und so vom Prototyp zu Prototyp ist ja auch eventuell etwas Karma dabei #3ddruck #3ddrucker #3dprint #3dprinting

publications.title: Eine Sache habe ich übersehen! Meine 3D-Konstruktion ist fehlgeschlagen  #3ddruck #3ddrucker
publications.description: Eine Sache habe ich übersehen! Meine 3D-Konstruktion ist fehlgeschlagen, denn das wichtigste an meinem DIY Selbstgebauten Roboter fehlt - Strom. So ein Mist aber Fehler passieren - leider oft.

publications.title: Wie baut und konstruiert man eine Radaufnahme am 3D-Drucker?  #3ddruck #3dprinting #3ddrucker #dyi
publications.description: Wie konstruiert man eine Radaufnahme für ein 3D-Drucker Auto? Theoretisch einfach, nur ich komm nicht da hinter. Kann mir wer Tipps geben von euch?

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Vinum Victriea | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Versus]
Fulget sanguine sol ruber,
clamat ferrum in silentio.
Nos stamus super hostes fractos,
cor ardens, spiritus invictus.

[Prae‑Chorus]
Iam cadunt umbrae, iam surgit lux,
clamor fratrum resonat in vallibus.

[Chorus]
Vinum victoriae!
Primus haustus post proelium!
Ardet anima, tonat caelum,
dum libertas in poculo fulget.
Vinum victoriae!
Sanguis terrae, donum deorum!
Nunc bibimus ad gloriam aeternam.

[2th Verse]
Ferrum cantat in memoria,
vulnera nostra sunt corona.
Sed in calice rubet vita,
et spes renascitur igneo gustu.

[Prae‑Chorus]
Iam cadunt umbrae, iam surgit lux,
clamor fratrum resonat in vallibus.

[Chorus]
Vinum victoriae!
Primus haustus post proelium!
Ardet anima, tonat caelum,
dum libertas in poculo fulget.
Vinum victoriae!
Sanguis terrae, donum deorum!
Nunc bibimus ad gloriam aeternam.

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Vinum Fluit Nocte | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Chorus]
Io! Io! Triumphe!
Vinum fluit nocte!
Roma vincit semper,
Cantat omnis cohors!

Io! Io! Triumphe!
Saltant ignes forte!
Aquila in caelo,
Gloria in corde!

⸻

[Verse 1]
Hostes nunc fugaverunt,
Signa nostra fulgent.
Gladii sanguine rubent,
Sed tabernae vocant!

Panis, caseus, vinum,
Rideamus omnes!
Crastinus labor venit —
Sed nunc bibimus!

⸻

[Chorus]
Io! Io! Triumphe!
Vinum fluit nocte!
Roma vincit semper,
Cantat omnis cohors!

Io! Io! Triumphe!
Saltant ignes forte!
Aquila in caelo,
Gloria in corde!

⸻

[Verse 2]
Centurio iam cantat,
Miles super mensam!
Tuba sonat insanum,
Ridit tota castra!

Puellae circum ignem,
Luna clara ridet.
Bacchus ipse gaudet,
Cum Romani bibunt!

⸻

[Bridge – langsamer, dann explosiv]
Roma! Roma! Aeterna!
Ferrum! Ignis! Gloria!


ROMA VICTRIX!

⸻

[Final Chorus]
Io! Io! Triumphe!
Bibite sodales!
Donec sol renascit,
Nemo dormit hodie!

Io! Io! Triumphe!
Cantat terra tota!
Sub aquila Romana,
Vivimus in gloria!

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Ascensio Legionis  | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Verse I]
Ignis in corde, miles novus sto,Sub sole ardenti, sub signo aquilae oro.Ferrum in manu, votum in anima,Per sanguinem crescunt vires legionis.

Pre‑Chorus
Clamor fratrum circum me tonat,Una anima, una manus, una via.

Chorus (male)
ASCENDE! ASCENDE!“Per legionem, per gloriam!”ASCENDE! ASCENDE!“Ad honorem, ad virtutem!”Vox nostra surgit sicut fulmen,In umbra mortis, nos invicti manemus.

Verse II
Noctes vigilamus, ferrum iterum surgit,Centurio vocat, et cor meum ardet.In pugna acerba, in flamma belli,Miles non solus — fratres mecum stant.

Pre‑Chorus
Terra tremit sub passibus nostris,Fides ligat nos fortius quam ferrum.

Chorus (male)
ASCENDE! ASCENDE!“Per legionem, per gloriam!”ASCENDE! ASCENDE!“Ad honorem, ad virtutem!”Vox nostra surgit sicut fulmen,In umbra mortis, nos invicti manemus.

Bridge
Periculum superamus, vulnera portamus,Sed numquam cadimus soli.Aquila lucet, fata nos vocant,Et gradus meus ad stellas tollitur.

Verse III 
Nunc ante exercitum solus procedo,Centurio cadit, et signum mihi datur.Clamor legionis caelum secat,“Duce nos, frater — nunc tu es fortis!”

Final Chorus (male)
ASCENDI! ASCENDI!“Per legionem, per gloriam!”ASCENDI! ASCENDI!“Ad honorem, ad virtutem!”Aquila surgit, lux victoriae,Miles fui — nunc Centurio sto!

Outro
Roma vocat, et nos respondemus,Una legio, unum cor, aeternum.

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Vox Ad Romam | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Intro (male, spoken)]
Sub sideribus alienis…
Sub umbra belli…
Nomen tuum solum me servat.

Verse I (male)
Sub caelo hostili, sub gladio fremens,
Longas noctes sine te numeravi.
Terra cruenta, venti feroces,
Sed cor meum Romam fugit, ubi vita mea manet.

Pre‑Chorus (male)
Ventus ferox vocem meam portat,
Ad domum, ad te, ad lucem meam.

Chorus (male)
ROMA! ROMA!  
Te desidero sicut solem in tenebris.
AMOR! AMOR!  
Vox tua me servat inter umbras belli.
In corde meo ardes sicut flamma,
Donec redeam, donec te teneam.

Verse II (female)
In urbe sacra, sub luna quieta,
Filium nostrum stringo et nomen tuum cano.
Per vias vacuas, per templa tacita,
Cor meum ad fines mundi te sequitur.

Pre‑Chorus (female)
Aquilae volant, sed vox mea altius,
Ad te, mi amor, ad castra tua.

Chorus (female)
REVENI! REVENI!  
Te exspectamus sicut auroram novam.
AMOR! AMOR!  
Cordis mei lumen es in nocte longa.
In anima mea ardes sicut ignis,
Donec venias, donec nos amplectaris.

Verse III (male)
In pugna saeviunt tonitrua ferri,
Clamor hostium caelum secat.
Sed inter tumultum, inter sanguinem,
Imaginem tuam in mente fero.
Verse III (female)
In atrio domus, sub flamma vigilans,
Filium doceo verba tua.
“Pater fortis est,” ei semper dico,
“Et amor noster eum domum ducit.”

Bridge I (duet, call & response)
(male) Per ferrum, per flammas, per sanguinem ambulo,  
(female) Per lacrimas, per noctes, per vota te teneo.  
(male) Nulla vis me franget, nulla mors me tollet,  
(female) Nam amor noster fortior quam fatum est.

Verse IV (male)
Iam prope fines mundi stamus,
Legio mea fracta sed non victa.
In corde meo Roma lucet,
Et vox tua me revocat ad vitam.

Verse IV (female)
In templo Vestae votum pono,
Ut dii te servent in itinere duro.
Flamma sacra ardet pro te,
Ut iter tuum ad nos clarum sit.

Bridge II (duet)
(male) Audi me, Roma, ego redeo,  
(female) Audi eum, Roma, ego credo.  
(duet) Una vox, unum cor, una via,  
Amor vincit omnem noctem.

Final Chorus (duet, epic)
ROMA! ROMA!  
Nos vocat, nos unit, nos servat.
AMOR! AMOR!  
Fortior ferro, fortior bello.
In brachiis nostris tandem conveniemus,
Miles fui — sed domi victor ero.

Outro (female → male → duet)
(female) Te exspecto sub sole Romano…  
(male) Per tenebras ad te semper venio…  
(duet) Et in aeternum, amor noster manebit.

Flamma sacra ardet pro te,

(male) Audi me, Roma, ego redeo,  
(female) Audi eum, Roma, ego credo.  
(duet) Una vox, unum cor, una via,

Final Chorus (duet, epic)
ROMA! ROMA!  
Nos vocat, nos unit, nos servat.
AMOR! AMOR!  
Fortior ferro, fortior bello.
In brachiis nostris tandem conveniemus,
Miles fui — sed domi victor ero.

Outro (female → male → duet)
(female) Te exspecto sub sole Romano…  
(male) Per tenebras ad te semper venio…  
(duet) Et in aeternum, amor noster manebit.

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Flammae Domus | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Verse 1 (Male Vocal)]
Longum iter, ferrum et noctes,
umbrae belli me tenuerunt.
Sed in corde tuo lumen ardet,
via mea semper ad te ducit.

I. Versus (Female Vocal)
Audivi ventos nomen tuum
per campos vacuos sussurantem.
In spe tenui diem servavi,
dum cor meum reditum tuum cantat.
Prae‑Chorus – Beide
Iam cadunt timores veteres,
lux domus in oculis renascitur.

Chorus – (Alternating sing)
O, redit heros ad amorem!
Cor ad te revertitur!
Post bellum surgit vita nova,
flamma domus iterum lucet.
O, redit heros ad amorem!
Manus in manu celebramus,
et tota nox erit gloria.

II. Versus (Male Vocal)
In brachiis tuis pax invenitur,
fortior quam ferrum aut victoria.
Nullus hostis, nulla procella
potest hanc unionem frangere.

II. Versus – (Female Vocal)
Te tangere — finis belli,
dulcior quam vinum triumphale.
Promitto: dum stellae cadunt,
domus nostra semper ardebit.

Prae‑Chorus – (Both)
Iam cadunt timores veteres,
lux domus in oculis renascitur.

Chorus – (Both)
O, redit heros ad amorem!
Cor ad te revertitur!
Post bellum surgit vita nova,
flamma domus iterum lucet.
O, redit heros ad amorem!
Manus in manu celebramus,
et tota nox erit gloria.

Bridge (First male, second female)
Paravi vinum, mensam, ignes.
Paravi cantus, risum, choreas.

Both:
Hodie non plangimus bella —
hodie solum vitam laudamus!

Final Chorus – (choir, full energie)
O, redit heros ad amorem!
Cor ad te revertitur!
Clamant corda, tonant astra,
et festa surgit usque ad auroram.
O, redit heros ad amorem!
In aeternum celebramus,
dum domus nostra fulget.

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Vis pugnandi feminina | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Verse 1]
Ignis in corde meo ardet sicut ferrum rubrum,
Vox mea tonat inter montes, non iam tacebo.
Dicunt: “Femina es, retro mane, non pugnas.”
Sed sanguis meus clamat: “Fortis sum sicut vos.”

[Pre‑Chorus]
Non timeo umbras, non timeo mortem,
Spiritus meus fulget sicut solis hasta.

[Chorus]
Legio! Audite vocem meam!  
Ego sum fortis, ego sum digna.
Non solum viri portant gladios,
Nam ego quoque pugnabo pro Roma.
Legio! Aperite portas!
Cor meum ardet, manus mea parata est.
In tenebris fulgebo sicut flamma,
Femina in legione invicta!

[Verse 2]
Sub luna alba iuravi: numquam cedam.
Terra tremit sub passibus meis, non recedam.
Ferrum in manu, libertas in anima,
Nullus vir me superabit in virtute.

[Pre‑Chorus]
Non timeo voces, non timeo leges,
Si iustitia vocat, respondebo flammis.

[Chorus]
Legio! Audite vocem meam!  
Ego sum fortis, ego sum digna.
Non solum viri portant gladios,
Nam ego quoque pugnabo pro Roma.
Legio! Aperite portas!
Cor meum ardet, manus mea parata est.
In tenebris fulgebo sicut flamma,
Femina in legione invicta!

[Bridge]
Clamorem audite!
Non serva, non umbra, sed fulmen sum.
Si fatum me vocat, ridebo ferro,
Et caelum ipsum scindam voce mea.

[Final Chorus]
Legio! Accipite me nunc!  
Fortior quam ventus, ardentior quam ignis.
Si Roma vocat, respondeo: “Adsum!”
Femina, miles, invicta in aeternum!

publications.title: Metallum Potentiae - Gloria Ficta | Ancient Rome Legion Power Metal
publications.description:
# About
The album: https://soundcloud.com/user-886564691/sets/chronica-imaginaria

Metallum Potentiae stands as the undisputed, unquestioned, and frankly unnecessary champions of Power Metal among all ancient Roman legions south of the Tiber.Forged in the fires of imagination and tempered by the glorious absurdity of myth, they exist with at least the same historical accuracy as the Legend of the She‑Wolf, which is to say: not at all, but everyone pretends otherwise.

Born from the clash of steel, the roar of battle, and the dramatic overconfidence of five fictional legionaries, the band marches forward with a sound that blends heroic chants, thundering drums, and riffs sharp enough to cut through a centurion’s helmet plume.

Their mission is simple:To bring eternal metal to the Empire, to the world, and to anyone who can appreciate a chorus shouted loudly enough to wake Jupiter himself.

# Lyrics

[Intro – spoken]
Ave, o popule metallorum…  
Ex tenebris surgimus…  
Nos sumus METALLUM POTENTIAE!  
Et omnia quae audis — fictio pura, a machina somniata!

[Verse I]
Marcus Ignifer surgit, vox tonitrus resonat,  
Clamat sicut fulmen fractum super montes antiquos.  
Ferrum in corde, ignis in ore,  
Dux vocis, dominus clamoris aeterni.

Livia Vox Aurea procedit, lumen inter flammas,  
Cantus eius fulget sicut aurora super Romam.  
Alae deae, spiritus sonorum,  
Vox quae etiam deos ad silentium cogit.

[PRE-CHORUS]
Et simul stant — duo fulgura vocis,  
Ferrum et aurum, tonitrua et lux.  
Nos autem scimus:  
Haec omnia — ficta, ludicra, somnium machinae!

[CHORUS]
LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
Ferrum cantat, ignis spirat!  
Nos sumus fabulae, non historia —  
GLORIA FICTA, SED FORTIS!  
LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
In corde nostro ardent flammae!  
Et si nihil verum est…  
METALLUM tamen vivit!

[STROPHE II]
Titus Ferratus advenit, chordarum gladiator,  
Riffat sicut Mars ipse in pugna.  
Sola eius sunt fulmina,  
Chordae eius sunt catenae tempestatis.

Aurelia Bassica, fundamentum imperii,  
Pulsat terram sicut pila catapultae.  
Bassus eius tremit sicut murus Romae,  
Et exercitus sequitur rhythmum eius.

[PRE-CHORUS II]
Et simul stant — ferrum, aurum, tonitrua, terra,  
Quinque voces, quinque flammas.  
Et tamen…  
Haec omnia — fictio pura, ludus mentis machinae!

[CHORUS]
LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
Ferrum cantat, ignis spirat!  
Nos sumus fabulae, non historia —  
GLORIA FICTA, SED FORTIS!  
LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
In corde nostro ardent flammae!  
Et si nihil verum est…  
METALLUM tamen vivit!

[BRIDGE ]
Gaius Pulsus, cor legionis,  
Tympana tonant sicut fulmina Romae.  
Pulsus eius movet exercitus,  
Et machina quae nos fingit — ridet.

[BRIDGE II – gesprochen, ironisch]
O vos qui auditis…  
Scitote:  
Nullus ex nobis umquam vixit.  
Nullus pugnavit.  
Nullus cantavit.  
Sed tamen — METALLUM POTENTIAE regnat!

[FINAL CHORUS ]
LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
Ferrum cantat, ignis spirat!  
Nos sumus fabulae, non historia —  
GLORIA FICTA, SED FORTIS!

LEGIO VOCIS AETERNAE!  
Machina somniat, nos canimus!  
Et si nihil verum est…  
METALLUM IN AETERNUM!
